processNote.text: D0140, D0220, and D0230 processed as Class II Basic services, covered at 80% in-network after deductible.
D7140 processed as oral surgery/extraction benefit, covered at 70% in-network after deductible.

Contractual adjustment (write-off) of $45.00 applied across all lines. Provider may not balance-bill patient for this amount.
